title: Latin Patriarch will have access to Jerusalem holy site after police stopped entry
headline: Latin Patriarch will have access to Jerusalem holy site after police stopped entry
deck: The Israeli PM says Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa had been asked not to enter the church over concerns about Iranian strikes.
